title: elatostema monandrum var. pinnatifidum
intro: Elatostema monandrum var. pinnatifidum, also known as the Elatostema plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae, native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elatostema monandrum var. pinnatifidum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is sometimes used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
